welcome.content: 👋 Parents, please complete this questionnaire to provide a holistic overview of your child, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

background_1.question: Why are you seeking an assessment now? Top three concerns.

background_2.question: Which areas are of concern? (tick all that apply)
background_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_3.question: How long have you had these concerns?
background_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_4.question: Has anyone (school, GP, family member) suggested a possible diagnosis?
background_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_5.question: Do you need this report for a specific reason?
background_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_1.question: Who lives at home with your child? (term-time)
family_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_2.question: Any special family circumstances we should know about?

family_3.question: Family history (tick all that apply):
family_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_4.question: Languages spoken at home
family_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_1.question: Was your child born at full term?
dev_milestones_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_2.question: Did your child achieve early developmental milestones within the usual time frames?
dev_milestones_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_3.question: Any history of Speech & Language Therapy?
dev_milestones_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_4.question: Any history of Occupational Therapy?
dev_milestones_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_5.question: History of significant illness, injury or surgery (grommets, tonsils, sleep apnoea, head injury)?
dev_milestones_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_6.question: Which hand does your child use for writing?
dev_milestones_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_1.question: Is your child taking any regular medication?
health_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_2.question: How would you describe your child's sleep?
health_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_3.question: Any sensory sensitivities (noise, food textures, clothing)?
health_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

vision_hearing_1.question: Vision assessed in the last 2 years?
vision_hearing_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

vision_hearing_2.question: Hearing assessed in the last 2 years?
vision_hearing_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_1.question: Has your child changed schools at any point?
education_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_2.question: If yes, please explain the reasons for the move(s).

education_3.question: Were there any periods of absence from school or difficulties attending school?
education_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_4.question: If yes, please explain in more detail.

education_5.question: Has your child ever been excluded, or placed on a reduced timetable?
education_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_6.question: If yes, please explain in more detail.

education_7.question: How did your child cope with the transition to secondary school?

options.label: Took most of the first year

education_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_8.question: Any difficulties with the bigger building, lockers, timetable, lesson changeover?
education_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_9.question: Did your child have an IEP / SEN support plan at primary school?
education_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_10.question: Is your child currently receiving SEN support / 1:1 sessions?
education_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_11.question: Has your child been previously assessed by an Educational Psychologist?
education_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_12.question: Has your child been assessed by other professionals? (tick all that apply)
education_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_13.question: Does your child currently have an EHCP?
education_13.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_1.question: Does your child read for pleasure?
literacy_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_2.question: How would you describe your child's reading speed compared with peers?
literacy_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_3.question: Does your child read fluently aloud, or hesitantly?
literacy_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_4.question: Does your child re-read passages to extract meaning?
literacy_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_5.question: Does your child struggle with spelling? (Please give 2-3 examples of frequent misspellings)

literacy_6.question: Does your child find writing extended pieces (essays in History, Geography, English) difficult?
literacy_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_7.question: Does handwriting tire your child or slow them down?
literacy_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_8.question: Has your child been taught touch-typing?
literacy_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_1.question: How does homework duration compare with the school's expected duration?
attention_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_2.question: Does your child run out of time in tests or exams?
attention_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_3.question: Does your child forget multi-step instructions?
attention_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_4.question: Does your child have difficulty remembering homework, equipment, kit, lockers, timetable?
attention_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_5.question: Does your child get distracted easily?
attention_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_6.question: Can your child hyperfocus on a preferred activity (gaming, sport, music)?

options.label: Yes - finds it hard to stop

attention_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_7.question: Are there any concerns about impulsivity, fidgeting or restlessness?
attention_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_8.question: Can your child plan and revise for a test independently?

options.label: Tends to leave to last minute

attention_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_9.question: Does your child still need help packing their school bag?
attention_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_1.question: Does your child seem anxious about school?
emotional_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_2.question: Anxiety about specific situations:
emotional_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_3.question: Has school attendance been disrupted at any time?
emotional_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_4.question: Friendships:
emotional_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_5.question: Any history of bullying?
emotional_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_6.question: Does your child's mood swing between subjects or situations?
emotional_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_7.question: Does your child express frustration through outbursts or meltdowns?
emotional_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_8.question: Has your child ever spoken to a counsellor, therapist, CAMHS or psychiatrist?
emotional_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_14.question: Where are the difficulties most noticeable? (tick all that apply)
education_14.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_15.question: Are there subjects your child currently dreads or actively avoids?

independent_learning_1.question: Where does your child do homework?
independent_learning_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section K - Independent Learning at Home

independent_learning_2.question: Does your child use a laptop / tablet for school work?
independent_learning_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section K - Independent Learning at Home

independent_learning_3.question: Does your child use any assistive technology (speech-to-text, text-to-speech, reading pen, audiobooks)?
independent_learning_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section K - Independent Learning at Home

independent_learning_4.question: Does your child use revision tools (Quizlet, mind maps, BBC Bitesize)?
independent_learning_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section K - Independent Learning at Home

independent_learning_5.question: Is your child receiving private tutoring or coaching outside school?
independent_learning_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section K - Independent Learning at Home

strengths_1.question: What does your child love doing? (hobbies, sports, clubs, passions)

strengths_2.question: What are your child's strengths, as you see them?

closing_1.question: Is there anything else you'd like the psychologist to know?

closing_2.question: Who should receive a copy of this report by email?

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
